case_title: WILLIAMS, JEANNE L. DBA KRAFTY KORNER VS. JAMES HOLMES

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, JEANNE L. DBA KRAFTY KORNER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, JEANNE L. DBA KRAFTY KORNER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLMES, JAMES $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $71.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $271.00, PLAINTIFF IS LIABLE FOR DAMAGES TO THE FLOOR; HOWEVER $500.00 FOR SUCH CLEANING IS EXCESSIVE. A REASONABLE FEE IS $300.00 LEAVING A $200.00 BALANCE OWED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $556.52 FILED BY WILLIAMS, JEANNE L. DBA KRAFTY KORNER AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-24-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, JAMES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, JEANNE L. DBA KRAFTY KORNER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CASE WAS CONTINUED TO TODAY FOR STATUS ON DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY PROCEEDINGS. DEFENDANT ADVISES THE COURT THAT HIS BANKRUPTCY ATTORNEY ADVISED HIM TO PROCEED WITH THIS CASE IN SMALL CLAIMS BECAUSE THE AMOUNT THE PLAINTIFF IS ASKING FOR IS "NOT WORTH THE TIME OR PAPERWORK" TO PROCEED IN BANKRUPTCY COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS FILED BY WILLIAMS, JEANNE L. DBA KRAFTY KORNER HOLMES, JAMES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2009 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-02-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT HAS FILED CHAPTER 13 BANKRUPTCY. CONTINUED FOR UPDATE ON BANKRUTCY PROCEEDINGS. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE DONALD J. SULLIVAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. HEARD IN DEPT. 318.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2009 - JUDGMENT.
